definition:
1. grain, corn: food made from grain, bread , ποιεῖσθαι σιτία ἀπὸ ὀλυρέων to feed off spelt, (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. generally, food, victuals, provisions , (Herdotus Historicus); σιτία ἡμερῶν τριῶν three days' provision , of soldiers, (Aristophanes Comicus); σιτία καὶ ποτά meat  and drink, (Plato Philosophus) 
3. τἀν Πρυτανείῳ σιτία public maintenance  in the Prytaneum, (Aristophanes Comicus); compare σίτησις. 
4. rarely food  for dogs, (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
